【Vibrant Patterns】Each Wind Up Toy Features A Festive Christmas Design, Adding Extra Excitement To The Holiday Season. Kids Will Love Playing With These Colorful And Eye-Catching Toys.

description: Product description Product Description Christmas wind up toys for children and adults, including gingerbread man, Santa Claus, snowman, penguin, elk, etc. Look at these colorful wind-up toys. A super value pack toy set includes 8 pieces Christmas-themed toys, super cute. Wind up toys is a great way to develop fine motor skills for young kids. Each wind up toy included can perform different actions. These Festive Christmas Accessories provide a great Christmas experience for everyone. Wind up toys with Christmas design style can also be placed on desks, bookcases, tea tables, fireplaces and other furniture as a pleasing decoration. As exquisite Christmas decorations, they cater to the Christmas theme, create a happy atmosphere.
